calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: INV-074/MECH-334/MECH-333 crystallization-necessity TRUE-NEGATIVE-CONTROL retest (+MECH-341/313 floor contrast): strip the always-on diversity floor (noise_floor/E3-diversity/dACC-suppression off; structured curiosity decoupled from crystallize) so crystallization is the SOLE phase-3 diversity route in ARM_1; phase-dependent entropy bonus (0.02 generator in phases 0-2, swept {0,0.005,0.02} in phase 3) maps the collapse threshold; ARM_4 floor-on (MECH-341/313). 5 conditions x 3 seeds, IGW-023 Phase-3 pressure. Supersedes 610e (confounded control).
items.note: Routed by failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-610e_2026-06-05 (confounded negative control). 610e was the FIRST harness-fixed crystallization run (policy genuinely trained, expansion stepped 1249 params, ewc_penalty in loss) but d2_control_shows_collapse=FALSE because MECH-313 noise floor + MECH-341 E3 score-diversity + the always-on policy entropy bonus held diversity up in BOTH arms -> INV-074's collapse-without-crystallization premise was never instantiated. 610f makes ARM_0 a TRUE NEGATIVE: (a) strip noise_floor + E3 score-diversity + dACC anti-recency suppression, and decouple structured curiosity from crystallize, in the stripped arms so the ONLY ARM_0-vs-ARM_1 difference is crystallize_at_phase3; (b) make the policy entropy bonus PHASE-DEPENDENT -- ENTROPY_BONUS_TRAIN=0.02 in phases 0-2 (every arm; generates the diversity so D3 sanity is non-vacuous + crystallization has something real to preserve) and SWEPT in phase 3 {ARM_0=0.0, ARM_2=0.005, ARM_3=0.02} to map where the control starts to collapse; (c) ARM_4 = stripped control + noise_floor + E3 score-diversity ON to test MECH-341/313's robust-floor reading honestly (the fork-c observation 610e could only note, now scored via D4). Carries forward the MANDATORY startup assertion (_assert_fixes_wired ERRORs the run if policy-train / expansion-step / ewc-penalty wiring is missing). Acceptance: D1 ARM_1.end_p3 - ARM_0.end_p3 >= +0.10; D2 ARM_0.end_p2 - ARM_0.end_p3 >= +0.10 (true-negative collapses); D3 both > 0.4 at phase2; PASS = D1 AND D2 AND D3. D4 ARM_4.end_p3 - ARM_0.end_p3 >= +0.10 scores MECH-341/313 (per-claim). evidence_direction_per_claim emitted (5 claims). Pre-registered fork: D2 FAIL with D3 holding = V3 policy not WTA-prone -> non_contributory-for-INV-074 (universal invariant NOT weakened), escalate Phase-3 pressure; D2 PASS + D1 FAIL = weakens MECH-334 -> /diagnose-errors. ~35h cloud run (610e actual ~142 min/run x 15 runs). 10th crystallization-arm result; FIRST with both harness fixed AND a genuine true-negative control.

items.title: scaffolded_sd054_onboarding FULL-SCALE substrate-readiness run (foraging-competence amend validation): single-arm all-levers-ON at restored budget P0=100/P1=50 (Stage0=20/Stage0b=10/P2=15, 200 steps/ep), z_goal_enabled=True + drive_weight=2.0. Cue-recall bridge + reef-spawn weaning 0.4 + auto-reconcile gating-to-seeding + 634c seeding calibration (gain1.5/thr0.02/drivefloor0.9) + developmental window. Gate G0 Stage-0 z_goal>0.4 + G1 P1 survival + G2 P2 contact>0, each >=2/3 seeds. Lynchpin blocking commitment_closure:GAP-4 / goal_pipeline:GAP-4 / infant 603-chain.
items.note: Lynchpin substrate-readiness run validating the 2026-06-05 scaffolded_sd054_onboarding foraging-competence residual amend at FULL budget. The 2026-06-05 local readiness check (moderate budget Stage0=10/P0=28/P1=40/P2=14) proved all levers end-to-end on the contact-positive seed but scored 1/3 on the foraging axes; this asks whether the restored P0=100/P1=50 budget (matching V3-EXQ-603e, ruling out the budget confound) lifts survival+reach-contact to >=2/3 with ALL foraging-competence levers active. Single-arm ALL_LEVERS_ON (no OFF/baseline arm -- readiness gate, not a discriminative ablation): Stage-0 forced-feed nursery + Stage-0b protected consolidation (2026-06-03b) + SD-057 cue-recall bridge (use_incentive_token_bank+use_cue_recall+use_resource_encoder, SD-049-enabled phase envs, scaffold_stage0_bind_incentive_token formation fix) + 634c seeding calibration (gain1.5/thr0.02/drivefloor0.9) + scaffold_auto_reconcile_gating_to_seeding (derives gating floor b*=0.02/(1.5*(1+2*0.9))=0.004762 from live GoalConfig) + scaffold_p1_reef_spawn_hold_fraction=0.4 (graded reef-spawn weaning survival lever). Two-part-fix precondition: z_goal_enabled=True + drive_weight=2.0. PRE-REGISTERED GATES (task; each >=2/3 seeds): G0 Stage-0 z_goal_norm_peak>0.4 (ALSO the built-in positive control for goal FORMATION -- below-floor G0 self-routes substrate_not_ready_requeue, NOT a foraging verdict); G1 P1 survival (median last-10 ep len >=75); G2 P2 contact_rate>0. PASS = G0 AND G1 AND G2. The manifest ALSO reports the canonical design-doc readiness gate substrate_readiness_from_results (adds consumption-event-gated G3 z_goal_norm_at_contact_peak>0.4) + classify_interpretation_branch, so governance sees whether the FULL canonical gate (incl G3) cleared before flipping substrate_queue.foraging_competence_residual ready=true. claim_ids=[] (diagnostic; gates downstream cohorts, weights no claim). NAMING (user directive 2026-06-06): 603f label repurposed for the substrate-readiness run; the Q-045/MECH-313/MECH-260 4-arm ablation (experiment_proposals EXP-603F-POSTSUBSTRATE) is the DOWNSTREAM cohort ('603f-downstream') that resumes only after this gate clears (alongside the *b OCD behavioural re-queue + V3-EXQ-490L). On a foraging-competence-open FAIL (G0 pass, G1/G2 <2/3) the next blocker is the cue-to-action selection-authority thread (V3-EXQ-643a/643b), NOT more scaffold levers. validate_experiments OK (0 readiness-warnings); --dry-run PASS end-to-end (Stage-0 z_goal 0.434 formed, reconciled_floor 0.004762 exact, reef_spawn_eps fires, cue_fires 30; dry-scale g2=0 contact is the known dry-scale outcome). Do NOT start the runner -- user starts manually from the explorer.

items.title: arm-reuse Phase-0 MINT of the V3-EXQ-610 OFF/baseline arm (INV-074 crystallization necessity; ARM_0_stripped_control) on ree-cloud-2. OFF arm x 3 seeds, built from the canonical baseline module; records per-cell arm_fingerprint. Sibling to V3-EXQ-645 (ree-cloud-3) for the cross-instance determinism check.
items.note: Arm-reuse pre-minting (plan 7b). Runs ONLY the 610 OFF/baseline arm (crystallize=False, phase-3 entropy floor 0.0, MECH-313/341/260 floors OFF) built from experiments/_lib/baselines/exq610_inv074_crystallization_baseline.py -- the content-hashed contract a future 610g must build its OFF arm from. 610 is a CLOUD lineage (610b/c/d cloud-2, 610e/f cloud-1, all linux-x86_64) so cloud is the correct reuse machine-class. Queued TWICE (this entry = ree-cloud-2; V3-EXQ-645 = ree-cloud-3) so the same baseline is computed on two separate CX22 instances: Phase-0 cross-instance determinism check (zero false-collision exit criterion) -- after both run, compare the two manifests' OFF metrics (end_phase_*_entropy, mean_reward) within tolerance and record in arm_reuse_fingerprint_plan.md 7b. PHASE 0 EMIT-ONLY: records arm_results[i].arm_fingerprint; no cache consulted, no reuse executed. experiment_purpose=baseline (excluded from governance scoring); claim_ids=[] (single OFF arm cannot test INV-074). LOW priority so real science preempts. Do NOT start the runner; cloud-2/3 idle.

items.title: arm-reuse Phase-0 MINT of the V3-EXQ-610 OFF/baseline arm (INV-074 crystallization necessity; ARM_0_stripped_control) on ree-cloud-3. Identical script/config to V3-EXQ-644 (ree-cloud-2); the second instance for the cross-instance determinism check.
items.note: Arm-reuse pre-minting (plan 7b). Identical to V3-EXQ-644 but pinned to ree-cloud-3 -- the SECOND CX22 instance for the Phase-0 cross-instance determinism check. Runs ONLY the 610 OFF/baseline arm (crystallize=False, phase-3 entropy floor 0.0, floors OFF) from the canonical baseline module experiments/_lib/baselines/exq610_inv074_crystallization_baseline.py. After both V3-EXQ-644 (cloud-2) and this run complete, compare the two manifests' OFF metrics (end_phase_*_entropy, mean_reward) within tolerance: agreement confirms separate cloud instances are mutually deterministic on CPU torch (the assumption Regime A reuse rests on). The arm_fingerprint hash is identical across the two by construction (coarse machine_class = linux-x86_64-pyX.Y); the determinism check is on the recorded METRICS. PHASE 0 EMIT-ONLY. experiment_purpose=baseline; claim_ids=[]. LOW priority. Record the comparison in arm_reuse_fingerprint_plan.md 7b. Do NOT start the runner; cloud-2/3 idle.
